title: Create: Crafts & Additions and Aeronautics Compat
description: Compability between Create Crafts & Additions and Create Aeronautics, by allowing the Docking Connector to transfer energy when docked.
body:
The mod allows the docking connector block from Create Aeronautics (Simulated) to transfer energy from Create Crafts & Additions.  

Both [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) and [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition) needs to be installed.
